notes: Node 2.31 adds a small resilience retry (re-encode retried up to 3x on transient failure) plus 2.30's orphaned-ffmpeg reaper and 2.29's temp-prep timeout guards. IMPORTANT operational note: if DV Profile-5 (DV → P8) jobs fail on one node but work on another, it's almost always a BROKEN ffmpeg build on the failing node — some bleeding-edge nightly ffmpeg builds ship a libplacebo (Vulkan) filter that won't initialize ('Error initializing filters'), and the P5 pipeline needs it. Keep every node on the SAME known-good ffmpeg build; copy the working node's tools\ffmpeg.exe + ffprobe.exe to the failing one. See the README 'Running multiple nodes' + Troubleshooting sections. Server 3.36 carries the timezone fix (set TZ in docker-compose), per-node worker steppers (3.35), and the GPU+CPU worker-count cap.
